texto: In reality," he told Paulina, after knowing her a short time, "endings are unworthy of art. Works of art are always unfinished. Whoever creates them is never sure of having finished them. The same is true of all the best things in life. Goethe, even though he was a German, was right about this: 'Every beginning is beautiful, but one must stop on the threshold.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ángeles Mastretta sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “In reality," he told Paulina, after knowing her a short time, "endings are unworthy of art. Works…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, art, reality, útil em momentos de termino e trabalho.
